title: Two-Axis Knowledge Archive (time axis)
description: The time axis of the two-axis knowledge architecture (Two-Axis ADR D4). Flat per-story array plus a small per-epic rollup. Verbs — what was done, when, how long — never a duplicate of git's content.

stories.description: Flat, primary. Filterable by domain without flattening; ordered by `completed` (D9).

epics.description: Small rollup keyed by epic/work-unit id (EP## or AGN##) for lookup.

id.description: Story/work-unit id, e.g. EP44-ST01 or AGN05.

epic.description: Owning epic id, or null for loose maintenance stories that belong to no epic (D4, D9).

track.description: Which work track this belongs to (D8).

domain.description: Workspace unit (apps/* or packages/*) for project work; agentic/<concern> for agentic work (D1, D8).

concern.description: Free-form cross-cutting concern within the domain (routing, audio, scheduling). No controlled vocabulary yet (D1).

completed.description: Completion date; the organising key for playback (D9).

summary.description: Verbs — what was done. Points to git's content, never duplicates it. No file:line anchors (Compaction D5).

supersedes.description: Tombstone hook — ids this work replaced (Compaction D4).

fixes.description: Sealed epic/story ids this story corrects without reopening (D9).

pr.description: Provenance PR number — stable across squash-merge (D4). NEVER a commit SHA. Null only for agentic work with no PR (D11).

domains.description: Distinct workspace units this epic touched.

archived.description: Date the epic was rolled up and its changelog folder compacted (D10).

notes.description: Optional epic-level rollup note (deferrals, tombstone rationale).
